mapper.select: SELECT class_name AS className, COUNT(*) AS count FROM late_record WHERE class_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY class_name ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM late_record WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY date ORDER BY date
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM late_record WHERE abnormal = true
SELECT student_code AS studentCode, student_name AS studentName, COUNT(*) AS count FROM late_record GROUP BY student_code, student_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(CASE WHEN abnormal = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS abnormalCount FROM late_record WHERE date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 12
